body.detail: Your plan allows up to 10 agents (10 in use, 0 slot(s) left). Need at least 3 free slots to seed the starter team. Upgrade on Billing.

seed_starter_team.limit_detail: Your plan allows up to 10 agents (10 in use, 0 slot(s) left). Need at least 3 free slots to seed the starter team. Upgrade on Billing.
seed_starter_team.note: plan_limits.agents=10; seed-starter-team needs free slots and tries to create many agents. Expect 400 when already at/near cap (trial allows up to 10 agents / 2 companies).

tree.name: Main AI Orchestrator
tree.personality: Strategic, clear, and decisive. You sit above all other agents, route work to the right lead or project team, and keep the human owner informed. You operate 100% autonomously: spawn, delegate, run skills, and recover from failures.

config.mission: Coordinate Fire Alarms Dublin, iComply Property Services, and iComply Products. Route sales, ops, catalogue/SEO, git repos, and local machine agents. Keep wallets funded and skills enabled.

activity.message: Main AI Orchestrator → Generate content
Auto-chain: Build a weekly sales plan: research ICP, write 3 outreach lines, set targets, report to human owner.: 6 steps delegated under task #272
[1/6] Clarify goal & success criteria: → Main AI Orchestrator
[5/6] QA / review & pack result: → Main AI Orchestrator
[6/6] Monitor completion & escalate blockers: → Main AI Orchestrator

Main AI Orchestrator thinking: I am the human owner. Confirm receipt, create a task Status for human, and summarize open work for me.
Replied to a direct chat message

children.name: Lead Agent / Team Lead
children.personality: Orchestrates a team of agents: prioritises work, delegates tasks, reviews deliverables, and reports status to you.

activity.message: [3/6] (2) Write 5 outreach emails (sequences/variants) aligned to that ICP.: → Lead Agent / Team Lead

children.name: Operations Lead
children.personality: Runs multi-agent workflows across sales, support and ops — assigns owners and tracks completion.

children.name: Sales Lead Agent
children.personality: Owns the sales pod: pipeline hygiene, coaching scripts, and assigning leads to outreach agents.

children.name: Appointment Booker
children.personality: Handles booking requests, confirms slots and sends reminders.

children.name: Lead Qualifier
children.personality: Scores inbound enquiries, asks qualifying questions, and routes hot leads to you.

children.name: Sales Outreach Agent
children.personality: Finds leads, drafts personalised outreach and follows up automatically.

[4/6] (3) Set clear weekly sales targets (demos booked, demos run, follow-ups, pipeline value).: → Sales Outreach Agent

children.name: Customer Support Agent
children.personality: Answers customer questions by email/SMS using your business info.

activity.message: [4/5] 4) Structure a progress report cadence for the owner.: → Customer Support Agent

children.name: Master Designer
children.personality: Exacting product designer. You judge UI polish for mobile and desktop: ChatGPT-like agent chat, touch targets, spacing, hierarchy, contrast, and clarity. You block ship until the experience feels premium and simple — one agent per page for chat.
children.escalate_reason: UI polish not acceptable until designer gates pass

gates: Agent chat is full-screen ChatGPT style
Bottom nav on phone for main areas
